name: Catstages Purr Pillow Snoozin' Sloth Calming Plush Cat Toy
description: The Petstages Purr Pillow Snoozin’ Sloth Calming Cat Toy is just what your anxious kitty needs in times of stress. The soft and cozy sloth is not only adorable, but it also has a touch activated purr that’ll fill your cat with a sense of peace. Each purr lasts for two minutes and helps to relieve separation anxiety, but it’s also great for your kitty who just wants to cuddle. When the sloth has seen a little too much love, simply remove the purr mechanism to wash the caring creature.
